text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have sharpened my concentration to<n>a razor's
edge. My whole body is as<n>an eye, an ear, and a
heart.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now, I can observe Umas without<n>even looking. I
can see into their<n>hearts without even speaking.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the presence of Umas<n>through the air...
That is the state I<n>have achieved.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
As my entire body breathes in<n>Umamusume, I will
convert their<n>essence into the greatest
performance ever!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what she means by all<n>that, but her
spirits seem to be<n>soaring high before the race.
